boxDescription:
The fuse block is located under the hood in the engine compartment on the driver’s side of the vehicle. See “Engine Compartment Overview” in the Index for more information on location.
Remove the cover by turning the fastener counterclockwise. To reinstall the fuse panel cover, push in and turn the fastener clockwise.
